name: query_missive
description: Query CK_Missive backend for domain knowledge: official documents, contract cases, calendar, ERP finance, knowledge graph, tender search. Returns a natural-language answer plus structured sources.

question.description: The user's question in natural language (zh-TW preferred).

channel.description: Originating channel; used for trace & rate-limit bucketing.

session_id.description: Hermes session id to correlate with Missive agent_trace.
